transcription.text: Mama keeps red, red like a wagon. Mama keeps green, green like a dragon. Mama keeps white, bright like a wish come true. Mama's got the magic of Clorox 2. Clorox 2 Color Safe Bleach helps clothes look newer longer. Cleaners and brighteners keep colors and whites clean, bright, and pretty. Mama keeps me looking like I'm brand new. Mama's got the magic, Mama's got the magic of Clorox 2. Powder and bleach.
